creator: schade@t3.rim.or.jp
text:
After fished to installation on Mebius(MN-5000D@sharp).
In first boot, the booter say me "Invalied kernel."
Try install and boot again, bad it never changed.
(FreeBSD3.0 was success to installation)

How-To-Repeat: Use Mebius(MN-5000D@sharp) and install FreeBSD3.2.
